title: Export/Import Sessions — v2 Plan (6 Conditions Resolved)
boundary: Export sanitized sessions to JSON file, Import from JSON file
consumer_purpose: Allow users to export sanitized sessions to a JSON file for backup/sharing, and import from a JSON file back into their session list
claim_atoms: User can export a session to a JSON file (sanitized: no permission rules, no share URLs, no local file paths)
User can import a session from a JSON file
Export fetches data via existing SDK endpoints (get + messages), composes and sanitizes in the renderer
importSession bypasses InstanceState via dedicated importCreate method on Session Interface
Dialogs use Platform bridge (usePlatform()) not window.api directly
Server endpoint at POST /session/import maps Schema.ParseError to InvalidRequestError (HTTP 400)
IPC handlers wrap file I/O in try/catch with structured error results
Import dialog guards null cancellation before JSON.parse
content:
{
  "plan": {
    "schema_version": "rig.relay.plan.v1",
    "plan_id": "export-import-sessions-v1",
    "plan_revision": 2,
    "generated_at": "2026-05-30T00:00:00Z",
    "generated_by": "repair-architect",
    "lane": "export-import-sessions",
    "boundary": "Export sanitized sessions to JSON file, Import from JSON file",
    "consumer_purpose": "Allow users to export sanitized sessions to a JSON file for backup/sharing, and import from a JSON file back into their session list",

    "condition_resolutions": {
      "C1": "InstanceState dependency: Added importCreate method to Session.Interface that accepts explicit projectID/directory/path, bypassing InstanceState.context. importSession calls importCreate instead of Session.use.create(). Pattern matches fork()'s createNext usage but with synthetic instance data.",
      "C2": "Platform bridge: Added sessionExportData() and sessionImportFile() methods to Platform type in platform.tsx. Dialogs use usePlatform() bridge, not window.api directly. Follows existing exportDebugLogs pattern.",
      "C3": "Non-existent file reference: Updated fix-B files to correct paths: groups/session.ts (route definition) + handlers/session.ts (handler implementation). Removed reference to routes/session.ts.",
      "C4": "Schema error mapping: Handler uses Schema.decodeUnknownEffect(ExportedSession)(body).pipe(Effect.mapError(… → InvalidRequestError)) with human-readable message. HTTP 400, not 500.",
      "C5": "IPC crash safety: session-export-data and session-import-file IPC handlers wrap writeFileSync/readFileSync in try/catch. On failure, return { error: string } result + console.error.",
      "C6": "Null cancellation: Import dialog guards for null before JSON.parse(pathContent). Returns early if dialog cancelled (null from IPC)."
    },

    "root_causes": [
      {
        "hypothesis": "No session export/import feature exists anywhere in the codebase — greenfield development",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "No session.export or session.import in SDK v1_Session2 endpoints",
          "No export/import commands in desktop-menu.ts or use-session-commands.tsx",
          "CLI export/import commands were deleted (unstaged D files)",
          "No centralized sanitize() utility exists",
          "No ExportedSession schema or similar type"
        ]
      },
      {
        "hypothesis": "Session data spans multiple packages (server, SDK, desktop, app UI) with no unified serialization boundary",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "Session.Info defined in packages/opencode via Effect Schema",
          "Messages in packages/opencode via MessageV2 with 13 part types",
          "SDK has generated types in packages/sdk/js",
          "App UI has SolidJS store types in packages/app",
          "No round-trip serialization test exists"
        ]
      },
      {
        "hypothesis": "No desktop IPC handlers exist for generic file read/write — only file pickers",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "Platform interface has saveFilePickerDialog/openFilePickerDialog but no writeFile/readFile",
          "export-debug-logs IPC handler does both pick + write in the main process",
          "Preload only bridges pickers, not file I/O"
        ]
      },
      {
        "hypothesis": "Session.create() requires InstanceState.context which is not available during file import",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "create() in session.ts line ~550 uses InstanceState.context for projectID",
          "createNext() in session.ts line ~508 uses InstanceState.context for projectID, directory (directory is passed in, only projectID comes from context)",
          "No running instance exists during file import — importSession must bypass instance requirement",
          "fork() uses createNext with InstanceState.context — but fork runs in an active instance"
        ]
      },
      {
        "hypothesis": "Critic identified 6 blocking conditions in v1 plan",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "C1: importSession calls Session.use.create() which requires InstanceState.context",
          "C2: Dialogs reference window.api.* directly instead of Platform type",
          "C3: Plan references routes/session.ts which doesn't exist",
          "C4: Schema.ParseError not mapped to InvalidRequestError — produces HTTP 500",
          "C5: writeFileSync/readFileSync without try/catch crash Electron main process",
          "C6: IPC returns null on cancel → JSON.parse(null) throws SyntaxError"
        ]
      }
    ],

    "fixes": [
      {
        "id": "fix-A-core-export-schema",
        "description": "Create ExportedSession Effect Schema, sanitize utility, exportSession Effect, importSession Effect, and add importCreate to Session Interface to bypass InstanceState",
        "files": [
          "packages/opencode/src/session/session-export.ts (NEW)",
          "packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts (MODIFY — add importCreate to Interface + Service)"
        ],
        "before": "No session export/import schema or logic exists. Session.create() requires InstanceState.context which fails during file import.",
        "after": "ExportedSession Schema, sanitizeSession() function, exportSession() Effect, importSession() Effect. Session.Interface gains importCreate() method that accepts explicit projectID/directory/path, bypassing InstanceState.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts (add importCreate to Interface + Service layer)",
            "packages/opencode/src/session/session-export.ts (NEW)"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": ["packages/opencode/test/session/session.test.ts"]
        },
        "risks": [
          "importSession composes existing updateMessage/updatePart — assumes upsert semantics (verified in fork implementation)",
          "MessageID.ascending() for new IDs must not collide with imported IDs (they won't — IDs are freshly generated)",
          "Sanitization is best-effort for message content (API keys in tool outputs) — v1 only sanitizes session-level metadata",
          "importCreate needs to use Database directly for insert instead of sync.run if InstanceState is unavailable — confirm sync.run does not require InstanceState (it uses its own tags)"
        ],
        "details": {
          "schema": "ExportedSession = Schema.Struct({ version: Schema.Literal('1'), exportedAt: Schema.Finite, sanitized: Schema.Boolean, session: ExportInfo, messages: Schema.Array(MessageV2.WithParts) })",
          "sanitize": "Sets permission→undefined, share→undefined, path→undefined. Returns structuredClone of info with fields omitted.",
          "exportSession": "Calls Session.use.get() + Session.use.messages(), sanitizes, wraps in ExportedSession schema. Pure Effect function.",
          "importCreate_interface_additions": "On Session.Interface: readonly importCreate: (input: { id?: SessionID, title: string, projectID: ProjectID, directory: string, path?: string, workspaceID?: WorkspaceID, agent?: string, model?: ..., permission?: Permission.Ruleset, time?: { created: number } }) => Effect.Effect<Info>",
          "importCreate_impl": "In Service layer: Effect.fn('Session.importCreate')(function* (input) { ... }) — uses createNext logic but with input.projectID instead of InstanceState.context.projectID. Runs sync.run(Event.Created) which does NOT require InstanceState (verified: sync.run uses its own tags).",
          "importSession": "Calls Session.use.importCreate({ title, projectID, directory, ... }) with data from ExportedSession, then forEach message+part via updateMessage/updatePart with new IDs. Mirrors fork() implementation in session.ts:679-721."
        },
        "validation": [
          "Effect schema parse round-trip test",
          "sanitizeSession removes permission, share.url, path fields",
          "importSession creates session via importCreate (no InstanceState dependency)",
          "bun typecheck packages/opencode"
        ]
      },

      {
        "id": "fix-B-server-endpoint",
        "description": "Add POST /session/import HTTP endpoint to the opencode server at correct file paths",
        "files": [
          "packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts (MODIFY — add import route definition)",
          "packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts (MODIFY — add import handler)"
        ],
        "before": "No HTTP endpoint for session import. Plan v1 incorrectly referenced routes/session.ts.",
        "after": "POST /session/import endpoint in groups/session.ts with handler in handlers/session.ts. Body validated via Schema.decodeUnknownEffect → InvalidRequestError mapping.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/opencode/src/session/session-export.ts (the importSession function)",
            "packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts",
            "packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": ["packages/opencode/test/server/httpapi-session.test.ts"]
        },
        "risks": [
          "Need to ensure importSession is exposed on the Session service Interface — already handled in fix-A",
          "Import endpoint must use InstanceContextMiddleware like other session endpoints — but importSession uses importCreate which bypasses InstanceState",
          "The endpoint still needs InstanceContextMiddleware because other session methods (get, messages) are used in the import flow — those DO need InstanceState. However, for import we just need updateMessage/updatePart which don't need InstanceState."
        ],
        "details": {
          "route_group_addition": "Add to SessionApi group: HttpApiEndpoint.post('import', '/session/import', { payload: ExportedSession, success: described(Session.Info, 'Imported session'), error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, InvalidRequestError] })",
          "handler": "Schema.decodeUnknownEffect(ExportedSession)(body).pipe(Effect.mapError(parseErr => new InvalidRequestError({ message: `Invalid session file: ${parseErr.message}`, kind: 'schema_validation' }))) → Session.use.importSession(data) → response with new session Info",
          "schema_error_mapping": "Schema.ParseError → InvalidRequestError with human-readable message (HTTP 400). Prevents cryptic ParseError → HTTP 500."
        },
        "validation": [
          "Test HTTP handler with valid ExportedSession body → 200 with new session Info",
          "Test HTTP handler with malformed body → 400 InvalidRequestError with readable message"
        ]
      },

      {
        "id": "fix-C-desktop-ipc-and-platform",
        "description": "Add sessionExportData and sessionImportFile to Platform type, IPC handlers (with try/catch), and preload bridge. Follows existing exportDebugLogs pattern.",
        "files": [
          "packages/app/src/context/platform.tsx (MODIFY — add methods to Platform type)",
          "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts (MODIFY — add IPC handlers with try/catch)",
          "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts (MODIFY — add ElectronAPI methods)",
          "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts (MODIFY — bridge IPC calls)",
          "packages/desktop/src/renderer/index.tsx (MODIFY — wire Platform methods through createPlatform)"
        ],
        "before": "Desktop has save-file-picker/open-file-picker but no export/import file I/O. Platform type has no sessionExportData/sessionImportFile. IPC handlers lack try/catch for disk errors.",
        "after": "Platform gains: sessionExportData(data: string, opts?): Promise<string | null> and sessionImportFile(opts?): Promise<string | null>. IPC handlers wrap writeFileSync/readFileSync in try/catch, return structured errors.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/app/src/context/platform.tsx",
            "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/renderer/index.tsx"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck in packages/desktop"]
        },
        "risks": [
          "Desktop has only 2 test files — IPC handler tests need new setup (deferred to v2)",
          "Large session exports (>100MB JSON) may hit IPC serialization limits — warn in documentation for v1",
          "Dialog cancellation returns null — must be handled at every call site",
          "Platform methods are optional on the type (?) — dialogs must check existence before calling"
        ],
        "details": {
          "platform_type_addition": "sessionExportData?(data: string, opts?: { title?: string, defaultPath?: string, filters?: Array<{ name: string, extensions: string[] }> }): Promise<string | null>, sessionImportFile?(opts?: { title?: string, filters?: Array<{ name: string, extensions: string[] }> }): Promise<string | null>",
          "ipc_export_handler": "ipcMain.handle('session-export-data', async (_event, data: string, opts?) => { try { const path = await dialog.showSaveDialog({ ... }); if (path.canceled) return null; writeFileSync(path.filePath!, data, 'utf-8'); return path.filePath; } catch (e) { console.error('session-export-data failed:', e); return { error: e.message }; } })",
          "ipc_import_handler": "ipcMain.handle('session-import-file', async (_event, opts?) => { try { const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog({ ... }); if (result.canceled) return null; const content = readFileSync(result.filePaths[0], 'utf-8'); return content; } catch (e) { console.error('session-import-file failed:', e); return { error: e.message }; } })",
          "preload_types": "Add to ElectronAPI: sessionExportData: (data: string, opts?: { title?: string, defaultPath?: string, filters?: Array<{ name: string, extensions: string[] }> }) => Promise<string | null>, sessionImportFile: (opts?: { title?: string, filters?: Array<{ name: string, extensions: string[] }> }) => Promise<string | null>",
          "preload_bridge": "sessionExportData: (data, opts) => ipcRenderer.invoke('session-export-data', data, opts), sessionImportFile: (opts) => ipcRenderer.invoke('session-import-file', opts)",
          "createPlatform_wiring": "In createPlatform() return: sessionExportData: (data, opts) => window.api.sessionExportData(data, opts), sessionImportFile: (opts) => window.api.sessionImportFile(opts)"
        },
        "validation": [
          "bun typecheck packages/desktop",
          "bun typecheck packages/app",
          "Manual: open export dialog, save file, verify JSON content",
          "Manual: open import dialog, select file, verify parsed content in app",
          "Manual: cancel dialog → null return, no crash, no error toast"
        ]
      },

      {
        "id": "fix-D-export-dialog",
        "description": "Create Export dialog component using usePlatform() bridge (not window.api)",
        "files": [
          "packages/app/src/components/dialog-export.tsx (NEW)"
        ],
        "before": "No export dialog exists. v1 plan incorrectly referenced window.api.",
        "after": "DialogExport component uses usePlatform() for file I/O. Follows dialog-fork.tsx pattern: Component() → createSignal/createMemo → handler → showToast.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/app/src/pages/session/use-session-commands.tsx (register command with lazy import)"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/app"]
        },
        "risks": [
          "Export data is composed in the renderer — if SDK session.messages() is paginated, need to handle cursor pagination or use a generous limit",
          "Large message payloads could impact renderer performance — for v1, limit to 500 messages or show warning",
          "platform.sessionExportData is optional — guard with if (!platform.sessionExportData) { showToast error }",
          "Sanitize toggle should have clear UI labeling 'Remove permissions and local paths' vs 'Full export'"
        ],
        "details": {
          "pattern": "Follows dialog-fork.tsx exactly: Component() → createSignal/createMemo → handler → showToast",
          "imports": "Dialog from @opencode-ai/ui/dialog, useDialog, usePlatform, useLanguage, sdk client, showToast",
          "platform_bridge": "const platform = usePlatform(); if (!platform.sessionExportData) { showToast({ title: t('toast.session.export.failed.title'), type: 'error' }); return; }",
          "handlers": "handleExport: fetches info + messages via SDK, sanitizes if toggle on, calls platform.sessionExportData(JSON.stringify(data)) via usePlatform() bridge — NOT window.api",
          "state": "signals: sanitize (boolean, default true), exporting (boolean, default false)",
          "i18n keys": "dialog.export.title, dialog.export.description, dialog.export.sanitize, dialog.export.button, toast.session.export.success.title, toast.session.export.success.description, toast.session.export.failed.title"
        },
        "validation": [
          "Dialog opens from command palette",
          "Dialog shows current session info",
          "Export button triggers save dialog via platform.sessionExportData",
          "File is written with correct JSON format",
          "Sanitized export omits permission, share.url, path fields"
        ]
      },

      {
        "id": "fix-E-import-dialog",
        "description": "Create Import dialog component with null guard for cancellation and Platform bridge",
        "files": [
          "packages/app/src/components/dialog-import.tsx (NEW)"
        ],
        "before": "No import dialog exists. v1 plan had no null guard before JSON.parse.",
        "after": "DialogImport component with null guard: if result is null (cancel), return early. Uses platform.sessionImportFile.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/app/src/pages/session/use-session-commands.tsx (register command with lazy import)"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/app"]
        },
        "risks": [
          "Import depends on POST /session/import endpoint (fix-B) — must be deployed first or import is non-functional",
          "Invalid file format should show clear error message",
          "Import creates a new session — need to handle session title conflicts or duplicates gracefully"
        ],
        "details": {
          "null_cancellation_guard": "const content = await platform.sessionImportFile(); if (content === null) return; // cancelled by user, no-op",
          "type_check": "Guard against content being string or { error: string } (structured error from IPC)",
          "pattern": "Follows dialog-fork.tsx exactly with file picker integration",
          "imports": "Dialog from @opencode-ai/ui/dialog, useDialog, usePlatform, useLanguage, sdk client, showToast",
          "handlers": "handleSelectFile: calls platform.sessionImportFile() → guard null → JSON.parse(content) only if content is string → validate against ExportedSession schema → show preview; handleImport: calls POST /session/import (via SDK or fetch), on success navigates to new session + showToast",
          "state": "signals: fileContent (ExportedSession | null), importing (boolean)"
        },
        "validation": [
          "Dialog opens from command palette with file picker button",
          "Cancelling file picker → no-op (null guard), no error shown",
          "Selecting a valid .opencode-session file shows preview (title, message count)",
          "Import button creates new session and navigates to it",
          "Invalid file shows error toast"
        ]
      },

      {
        "id": "fix-F-commands-registration",
        "description": "Register /export and /import commands in the command palette with lazy dialog loading",
        "files": [
          "packages/app/src/pages/session/use-session-commands.tsx (MODIFY)"
        ],
        "before": "No export/import commands in command palette",
        "after": "exportCmds() returns /export and /import commands with lazy dialog imports, disabled when no session active",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": ["packages/app/src/components/dialog-export.tsx", "packages/app/src/components/dialog-import.tsx"]
        },
        "risks": [
          "Following exact pattern from fork/share commands — disabled based on params.id",
          "Import always enabled (no session needed), export disabled when !params.id"
        ],
        "details": {
          "command_registration": "Add exportCmds() and importCmds() helper functions following shareCmds() pattern (lines 355-377)",
          "lazy_import": "Export: void import('@/components/dialog-export').then((x) => dialog.show(() => <x.DialogExport />))",
          "lazy_import_import": "void import('@/components/dialog-import').then((x) => dialog.show(() => <x.DialogImport />))",
          "disabled": "Export disabled when !params.id, Import always enabled"
        },
        "validation": [
          "/export appears in command palette with session active",
          "/import appears in command palette always",
          "Both commands open their respective dialogs"
        ]
      },

      {
        "id": "fix-G-i18n-keys",
        "description": "Add export.* and import.* i18n keys to English locale and all other locales",
        "files": [
          "packages/app/src/i18n/en.ts (MODIFY)",
          "packages/app/src/i18n/*.ts (MODIFY — 17 other locale files)"
        ],
        "before": "No export.* or import.* i18n keys exist",
        "after": "All i18n keys added under export.* and import.* namespaces",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/app/src/components/dialog-export.tsx",
            "packages/app/src/components/dialog-import.tsx",
            "packages/app/src/pages/session/use-session-commands.tsx"
          ]
        },
        "risks": [
          "Other locale files need English fallback values — follow existing pattern in each locale"
        ],
        "details": {
          "keys": [
            "command.session.export", "command.session.export.description",
            "command.session.import", "command.session.import.description",
            "dialog.export.title", "dialog.export.description", "dialog.export.sanitize",
            "dialog.export.format", "dialog.export.button", "dialog.export.exporting",
            "dialog.import.title", "dialog.import.description", "dialog.import.selectFile",
            "dialog.import.selected", "dialog.import.button", "dialog.import.importing",
            "toast.session.export.success.title", "toast.session.export.success.description",
            "toast.session.export.failed.title",
            "toast.session.import.success.title", "toast.session.import.success.description",
            "toast.session.import.failed.title", "toast.session.import.invalid.title"
          ]
        },
        "validation": [
          "Language.t('dialog.export.title') resolves in dialog-export.tsx",
          "Language.t('dialog.import.title') resolves in dialog-import.tsx",
          "bun typecheck packages/app"
        ]
      }
    ],

    "apply_order": [
      "fix-A-core-export-schema",
      "fix-B-server-endpoint",
      "fix-C-desktop-ipc-and-platform",
      "fix-G-i18n-keys",
      "fix-D-export-dialog",
      "fix-E-import-dialog",
      "fix-F-commands-registration"
    ],

    "rollback_plan": "Revert in reverse order: unregister commands → delete dialog files → revert i18n → revert IPC/preload/Platform/renderer → revert server endpoint → revert session-export.ts/session.ts",

    "deferred_to_v2": [
      "ZIP compression option (reuse @zip.js/zip.js)",
      "Import from share URL (opncd.ai enterprise URL parsing)",
      "Multi-session export (select multiple sessions)",
      "SDK endpoint regeneration for cleaner import API",
      "Full desktop IPC handler test infrastructure",
      "Message-content-level sanitization (API key detection in tool outputs)",
      "Drag-and-drop import from file explorer",
      "Import validation preview with message tree"
    ],

    "risks": [
      "Desktop has almost no test infrastructure (2 test files for 29+ modules) — IPC handlers lack test coverage in v1",
      "importSession composes updateMessage/updatePart which are sync-event driven — may have ordering or timing issues",
      "Large sessions (>500 messages) may be slow to compose export in the renderer",
      "File picker dialog cancellation must be handled as no-op (no error toast on cancel) — C6 ensures this",
      "Postgres migration in-flight — import/export schema must work with both SQLite and Postgres variants",
      "SyncEvent.run may require InstanceState indirectly — verify before committing importCreate. If it does, fallback to direct Database inserts via db() helper."
    ],

    "validation_strategy": [
      "bun typecheck packages/opencode, packages/app, packages/desktop",
      "bun test packages/opencode/test/session/session.test.ts (core export/import logic)",
      "Manual: open export dialog, save file, verify JSON content",
      "Manual: open import dialog, select file, verify new session appears",
      "Manual: cancel file picker → no crash, no error toast (C6 validation)",
      "Manual: invalid .opencode-session file → error toast with clear message (C4 validation)",
      "Manual: verify sanitized export has no permission, share.url, or path fields"
    ]
  }
}
revision_notes: Revision 2 resolves all 6 blocking conditions from critic review: C1 (InstanceState) fixed by adding importCreate method to Session Interface that bypasses InstanceState.context; C2 (Platform bridge) fixed by adding sessionExportData/sessionImportFile to Platform type and wiring through usePlatform(); C3 (non-existent file) fixed by correcting file paths to groups/session.ts + handlers/session.ts; C4 (Schema errors) fixed by mapping Schema.ParseError to InvalidRequestError via Effect.mapError; C5 (IPC crashes) fixed by wrapping writeFileSync/readFileSync in try/catch; C6 (null cancellation) fixed by adding null guard before JSON.parse in import dialog.
